block_01: You may have heard of this strategy before: it is widely popular among traders. It is commonly used as it allows to benefit from the smallest price changes of an asset.
block_02: A scalper’s goal is to open and close deals with a small profit, the length of such deals is usually pretty short. The idea is that numerous small gains can add up to higher returns. Read the article to find out more about the Scalping method and see if it fits into your trading routine.
block_05: Asset volatility can be a great opportunity for a trader who knows how to take advantage of it. The Grid strategy works in unpredictable conditions when the price keeps bouncing up and down. Check the full article to learn how to use the Grid approach in practice.
block_08: No matter what strategy you use, an effective risk management strategy is crucial. What are the factors that lead a trader to losses? And how to deal with them? Learn about the steps you can take now.
